title: pixelBlocks
description: The pack where every pixel is a block texture!
body:
![pixelBlocks Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/pixelblocks/logo.webp)
## The pack where every pixel is a block texture!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/pixelblocks)




This pack makes it so that every pixel in a texture is a block texture!
